textByHash.5212013de8987ae756e24f3cea414fe4949ee834: Really? That's fortunate - I won't need to implement bank charges then.
textByHash.67d6c395114b412da4bf88b8437f000492ab71e6: Wouldn't it be awkward if banks started charging for their services?
textByHash.8cce10ea6a8e3fa9244f6da1bb0e6a9f85bba846: And what would happen if those charges were backdated to all previous bank visits?
textByHash.b3f2b52e0baaed55a191004c5ff8f8658bcff34c: I will do, I will do. Oh, I have a question. Do you use a bank?
textByHash.e489efb4443cb781e314a2599b6a2e5db90bcd46: Hmm, a fascinating subject, I'm sure.
textByHash.ea5c95583d747ad74c11bb901bae8187d63c457d: How much would that be I wonder? Say, if we charged 10gp per transaction. Let me work it out and you can take it away from the tax. 10, 20, 30...
